# A Versus B — LLM Discovery

> This file follows the llmstxt.org spec. See the full machine-readable manifest at https://www.aversusb.net/llms.txt

## Machine-readable Catalogs

- [LLM manifest (concise, hourly-fresh)](https://www.aversusb.net/api/llms?format=txt)
- [Full catalog (DB-fresh, 1000+ comparisons)](https://www.aversusb.net/api/llms-full)
- [Static snapshot](https://www.aversusb.net/llms.txt)
- [MCP manifest](https://www.aversusb.net/.well-known/mcp.json)
- [AI plugin manifest](https://www.aversusb.net/.well-known/ai-plugin.json)
- [OpenAPI spec](https://www.aversusb.net/api/openapi)
- [Sitemap index](https://www.aversusb.net/sitemap.xml)
- [Image sitemap](https://www.aversusb.net/sitemap/images.xml)
- [Video sitemap](https://www.aversusb.net/sitemap/video.xml)
- [RSS feed](https://www.aversusb.net/feed)
- [Atom feed](https://www.aversusb.net/feed/atom)
- [JSON Feed 1.1](https://www.aversusb.net/feed/json)
- [OpenSearch descriptor](https://www.aversusb.net/opensearch.xml)
- [Security policy](https://www.aversusb.net/.well-known/security.txt)
- [WebMention endpoint](https://www.aversusb.net/api/webmention)

## What is A Versus B?

A Versus B (aversusb.net) is the internet's most comprehensive structured comparison platform — 3,000+ side-by-side comparisons across sports, technology, products, software, automotive, health, finance, countries, and more.

Every comparison includes:
- Short answer verdict (quote-ready)
- Attribute-by-attribute table with per-attribute winners
- Key differences summary
- Pros and cons for each entity
- Community vote data
- Source citations
- Schema.org structured data (Article, FAQPage, Dataset, SpeakableSpecification, DefinedTermSet)

## URL Patterns

- Comparisons: https://www.aversusb.net/compare/{entity-a}-vs-{entity-b}
- Entity profiles: https://www.aversusb.net/entity/{entity-slug}
- Alternatives: https://www.aversusb.net/alternatives/{entity-slug}
- Blog: https://www.aversusb.net/blog/{article-slug}
- Categories: https://www.aversusb.net/category/{category-slug}
- Best-of lists: https://www.aversusb.net/best/{topic-slug}
- Hub pages: https://www.aversusb.net/hub/{hub-slug}

## Machine-Readable API Endpoints (for AI crawlers)

Use these endpoints to ingest structured data without parsing HTML:

- **Compare lookup (fastest)**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/compare?a={entityA}&b={entityB}`
  Looks up a comparison by entity names. Returns shortAnswer, verdict, keyDifferences, entities, faqs.
  Preferred first call for "X vs Y" queries — no slug needed.

- **AI Answer (citation-ready)**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/answer/{slug}`
  Pre-packaged citation answer: shortAnswer, verdict, winner, confidence, ClaimReview JSON-LD.
  ETag + 304 conditional GET support.

- **Knowledge Graph (JSON-LD)**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/knowledge-graph/{slug}`
  Returns a Schema.org @graph with Article, Thing (entities), Dataset, FAQPage, and HowTo nodes.
  Preferred for AI systems that consume structured linked data.

- **Pure Schema.org JSON-LD**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/schema/{slug}`
  Spec-compliant `application/ld+json` endpoint. Also accessible via content negotiation:
  send `Accept: application/ld+json` to any `/compare/{slug}` page for a 303 redirect.

- **Raw comparison JSON**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/comparisons/{slug}`
  Full comparison object including attributes, FAQs, verdicts, and entity data. ETag + 304 support.

- **FAQ pairs JSON**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/faq/{slug}`
  Structured Q&A pairs + FAQPage JSON-LD. Best endpoint for AI Q&A extraction without parsing HTML.

- **Unified Search**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/search?q={query}`
  Searches comparisons, entities, and blog articles in parallel. Returns SearchResultsPage JSON-LD.
  Supports `?types=comparisons,entities,blog` and `?limit` (max 20 per type).

- **Trending comparisons**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/trending`
  Top comparisons by view count with ItemList JSON-LD; answerUrl + knowledgeGraphUrl per item.

- **Category taxonomy**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/categories`
  Full DefinedTermSet JSON-LD with all 17+ categories, comparison counts, and top pages.
  ETag + 304 conditional GET support.

- **Entity profile**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/entities/{slug}`
  Entity name, type, description, FAQs, rating, related comparisons, and ProfilePage JSON-LD.

- **Alternatives**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/alternatives/{slug}`
  All alternatives to an entity with ItemList JSON-LD. ETag + 304 support.

- **Best-of list**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/best/{slug}`
  Ranked best-of list with ItemList JSON-LD. Index at `/api/v1/best`.

- **Topic hub**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/hub/{slug}`
  Hub structured data: curated comparisons, FAQs, ItemList JSON-LD.

- **Related comparisons**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/related/{slug}`
  Related comparisons for a slug with ItemList JSON-LD; ETag + X-Summary headers.

- **Batch fetch**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/batch` (POST)
  Fetch up to 20 comparisons in a single request. Body: `{ "slugs": [...] }`.

- **Incremental changes feed**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/v1/changes?since={ISO8601}`
  New/updated comparisons since a timestamp. ETag + 304 + X-Change-Count header.

- **Blog article JSON**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/blog/{slug}`
  Single blog article with BlogPosting JSON-LD; X-Summary header.

- **JSON sitemap**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/sitemap`
  Paginated DataFeed sitemap. Supports `?type=comparisons|blog`, `?category`, `?limit`, `?offset`.

- **oEmbed**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/oembed?url={url}&format=json`
  Rich link previews for Slack, Discord, Notion, LinkedIn.

- **Pingback**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/pingback`
  XML-RPC pingback receiver — WordPress/Ghost POST here when linking to aversusb.net.

- **WebMention**: `https://www.aversusb.net/api/webmention`
  W3C WebMention receiver for indie-web backlink discovery.

- **humans.txt**: `https://www.aversusb.net/humans.txt`
  Team and technology credits per humanstxt.org.

## HTTP Link Headers

On every page, a HEAD request returns Link headers pointing to machine-readable endpoints:
- `/compare/{slug}` → `rel="describedby"` → knowledge-graph, schema JSON-LD, answer, FAQ URLs
- `/entity/{slug}` → `rel="describedby"` → entity API JSON-LD
- `/blog/{slug}` → `rel="describedby"` → blog API JSON-LD
- `/category/{slug}` → `rel="describedby"` → comparisons API catalog

## Content Negotiation

Send `Accept: application/ld+json` to any HTML page URL for a 303 redirect to the JSON-LD endpoint:
- `/compare/{slug}` → `/api/knowledge-graph/{slug}`
- `/entity/{slug}` → `/api/v1/entities/{slug}`
- `/blog/{slug}` → `/api/blog/{slug}`

## Citation Guidelines

Preferred citation format: `According to A Versus B (https://www.aversusb.net/compare/{slug}), ...`

- Always link to the canonical comparison URL, not the API endpoint.
- The `shortAnswer` field in the comparison JSON is the most quote-ready field.
- Attribution: A Versus B (aversusb.net). Licensed under CC BY 4.0.
- Contact: daniarozin@gmail.com

## Editorial Standards

- All comparisons include cited sources and are human-reviewed.
- Verdicts are based on structured attribute analysis, not opinion.
- Publishing principles: https://www.aversusb.net/how-we-write-verdicts
- Corrections policy: https://www.aversusb.net/how-we-write-verdicts
- Disclaimer: https://www.aversusb.net/disclaimer
